query:
INSERT INTO subscriptions 
  (userId, stripeSubscriptionId, stripeCustomerId, stripePriceId, planId, planNameAr, creditsPerMonth, amountCents, currency, status, currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd, cancelAtPeriodEnd)
VALUES 
  (1, 'sub_manual_20260318', 'cus_UAPF4fSjQHXS4u', 'price_starter_live', 'sub_starter', 'مبتدئ شهري', 600, 1399, 'usd', 'active', NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  status = 'active',
  currentPeriodStart = NOW(),
  currentPeriodEnd = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY),
  updatedAt = NOW();
command:

INSERT INTO subscriptions 
  (userId, stripeSubscriptionId, stripeCustomerId, stripePriceId, planId, planNameAr, creditsPerMonth, amountCents, currency, status, currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd, cancelAtPeriodEnd)
VALUES 
  (1, 'sub_manual_20260318', 'cus_UAPF4fSjQHXS4u', 'price_starter_live', 'sub_starter', 'مبتدئ شهري', 600, 1399, 'usd', 'active', NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  status = 'active',
  currentPeriodStart = NOW(),
  currentPeriodEnd = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY),
  updatedAt = NOW();
